free_text: Cross section measurements of the reactions induced
by He-3 particles on carbon
A thin self-supported carbon foil, thickness of
8.12*E-17 at/cm**2,was used.
The carbon content in a Multi-Layer
C(X)H(Y)/Ti/C(X)H(Y) film on silicon have been
determined.
A 300 mm*2 silicon surface barrier detector
was placed 64 mm from the beam spot on the sample at
Lucas heights. At LARN, a surface barrier detector at
90 degree was placed 70 mm from the beam spot on the
sample.
The 2.5 MV Van De Graff Accelerator
The 3 MV Van De Graff Accelerator,
From G.Terwagne.
The absolute error on the cross section is
estimated to be 8%.
Statistical errors in the determination of the
area peak.
Systematic errors in the determination of
the solid angle.
Experimental errors in to the measurements of
the number of atoms in the standard and the number of
incident particles.
Last checking has been done.
DATE is corrected
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
